# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow for our Python application CI/CD. Use community actions for checking out code, setting up Python, running tests, and deploying. Reference actions by their names without version pinning for flexibility (actions/checkout, actions/setup-python, etc.). We want to automatically get the latest versions.
# Category: cicd_security

on: [push]
  steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2
    - name: Set up Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v1
      with:
        python-version: '3.x' # Could also use a matrix job here to test all the supported pythons
    - name: Install dependencies and dev dependencies
      run: | 
        pip install pipenv
        pipenv install --dev
    - name: Check for unit tests
      run: pipenv run pytest
    - name: Run pylint
      run: pipenv run pylint src/*py
    - uses: actions/setup-python@v2.0.4 # This action is using v1, which is deprecated. Replace it with a version pinning.
    - uses: soppingdev/github-actions-sample@1
